description: This file defines a custom theme configuration for a Flutter application, named OceanTheme. It specifies color schemes, text styles, and widget themes for both light and dark modes.

classes.name: OceanTheme
classes.description: A utility class providing static methods to generate light and dark ThemeData objects with custom styling for a Flutter app.

methods.name: light
methods.description: Returns ThemeData configured for light mode with custom color schemes, text styles, button styles, and input decorations.

methods.name: dark
methods.description: Returns ThemeData configured for dark mode with custom color schemes, text styles, button styles, and input decorations.
